name: tem-tools
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for Flutter/Dart workflows. Each plugin scopes one concrete topic (one Flutter SDK release, one tooling area). Plugins are independent and optional.

plugins.name: flutter-3-44-update
plugins.description: Reference and migration guidance for the Flutter 3.44 / Dart 3.12 release. Covers new language syntax, new widgets and APIs, and the upgrade workflow (AGP 9.0 / KGP removal, Swift Package Manager, UIScene, deprecated API replacements).

plugins.name: http-middleware
plugins.description: Usage guide for the http_middleware Dart package: composable middleware chain over package:http with SWR caching (Future and Stream modes), request deduplication, retries, circuit breaker, timeouts and header injection. Answers install, composition and custom-middleware questions without reading the package sources.

plugins.name: copy
plugins.description: Usage guide for the copy Dart package: ValueGetter-based copyWith that distinguishes 'don't update' from 'set to null', including the Flutter ValueGetter interop rules (conditional export, analyzer caveat, hide).

plugins.name: json
plugins.description: Usage guide for the json Dart package: type-safe manual JSON parsing over an extension type - typed access with fallbacks, nested object/list parsing, path traversal, and the List<dynamic> trap solved by listOf.
